items.title: Iran Army spokesman warns 'new fronts' will be opened with 'new equipment and new methods' if US attacks resume — admits ceasefire used to strengthen combat power
Xi-Putin Beijing summit (May 19-20): ~40 deals signed, Power of Siberia 2 'main parameters' agreed — Iran war disrupts half of China's oil imports, overland Russia energy ties deepen
Saudi Arabia confirms 3 drones intercepted from Iraqi airspace — FDD analysis: majority of attacks on Saudi originated from Iraqi territory, aligns with UAE Barakah confirmation
Iran military rebuilding during ceasefire — CSIS: 70% missile stockpiles intact, 30/33 Hormuz missile sites restored; China continues supplying components
House Democrats preparing another war powers vote — Gottheimer resolution; previous 3rd vote failed 212-212 tie
US beginning effort to guide 1,600 stranded ships through Hormuz — zero vessels transited May 19 for second consecutive day
VP Vance says 'a lot of progress' in Iran talks — Trump says deal will come 'very quickly'
Brent crude steadied above $105 after 5% drop — oil remains 50% above pre-war levels; ADNOC CEO says full recovery unlikely before late 2027
Kata'ib Hezbollah member charged with involvement in 20 attacks/attempted attacks in US and Europe, plus synagogue terror plot

Iran preparing for renewed war as military assets remain largely intact — Euronews analysis on ceasefire-era military rebuilding
